subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1913-04-06
subcodes.first_line: What did the Esperantists say last night? I delivered an address to them according to their conception of truth. They were the beginners, therefore I spoke to them with gentleness.
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @development of capacity and readiness, @relativity of religious truth, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @literal interpretation
